name: OCPGI Golf Golf lessons / Golf course
address: 441 E Columbine Ave Suite C, Santa Ana, CA 92707
about: Orange County Par Golf Institute (OCPGI) is a specialized golf training facility focused on advanced performance coaching and simulation technology. They offer private lessons using state-of-the-art equipment including Trackman and Foresight simulators, alongside Titleist Performance Institute biomechanics analysis. The venue caters to golfers seeking technical skill improvement, with a structured approach covering fundamentals, swing mechanics, short game mastery, and on-course strategy. Their pricing reflects a premium, coaching-centric model with sessions available by private booking only.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman and Foresight simulators with course play
Expert TPI Level 3 certified coaching for technical improvement
Specialized junior programs with US Kids Golf certification
Biomechanics-focused training for injury prevention and performance

simulator_hardware.notes: Level 2 certified Trackman system for launch monitoring
Foresight simulator with 105 virtual golf courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own golf equipment for lessons and simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink services, suggesting it's a BYOB facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, simulator sessions are typically 1-hour private coaching sessions.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, OCPGI offers US Kids Golf certified coaching programs specifically designed for junior golfers.
